name: Datafold Data Diff API
what_it_does: Data diffing and testing platform with REST API — automatically comparing data between production and development datasets during CI/CD, detecting schema changes and data value differences, integrating with dbt for PR-level data impact analysis, and providing column-level lineage with impact analysis.
use_cases: Running automated data diffs in CI/CD pipelines to catch data regressions before merge
Comparing prod vs staging datasets after dbt model changes via API
Querying column-level lineage for impact analysis when schema changes are proposed
Integrating data diff results into GitHub PR comments for data team review
Automating data migration validation by comparing source and target dataset sizes and values
not_for: Real-time data quality monitoring (use Bigeye or Monte Carlo for runtime monitoring)
Data catalog and governance without change impact focus
best_when: A data engineering team using dbt wants to catch data regressions before they reach production by automatically diffing affected models in CI/CD, with column-level impact understanding.
avoid_when: You don't use dbt, need runtime monitoring of production data (not pre-merge), or need a full data observability suite rather than CI-focused diffing.

auth.notes: API key from Datafold account. Passed as Authorization header (Key prefix). Organization-scoped access. No OAuth2 or webhooks. CI/CD integration via API key in GitHub Actions, dbt Cloud, or Airflow. Data source connections managed via UI.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for open-source projects; limited use
pricing.notes: San Francisco-based company. Founded 2020. Raised $23M. Backed by SignalFire and Y Combinator. Open-source data-diff Python library available separately. GitHub PR integration. dbt Cloud integration for Slim CI. Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Postgres support. Strong in data engineering teams with mature CI/CD.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for running data diffs, querying diff results, and managing data sources. Authorization: Key prefix. Good documentation. Data diff runs are asynchronous — poll for completion. CI integration via API key in build systems. Diff results include row counts, column-level diffs, and sample mismatches.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Diff result reads idempotent by diff ID. Data source reads idempotent. New diff runs create new records — check for recent run before creating duplicate.
known_agent_gotchas: Data diff runs are asynchronous — poll status endpoint for completion
Data source connections must be configured in Datafold UI before API use
Diff comparison requires both source and target data sources configured
Large table diffs can take significant time — set appropriate timeout in CI

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. API key with Key prefix. Warehouse credentials stored by Datafold for diff access — evaluate trust model. Read-only access to data for diffing. YC-backed with enterprise security focus.
